# Sabha OS

> Open-source Claude-native AI council protocol. Every load-bearing question is classified into one of 9 C-suite roles (CFO, CMO, CIO, CAIO, CSO, CXO, CHRO, CLC, CEO) and answered in the Chanakya tradition — terse, decisive, recommendation-first, tradeoff-aware, grounded. Three modes: ask (chat reply), engage (memo + auto-diary), deliberate (2-3 roles argue, CEO synthesizes). Memory-backend-agnostic; works with Claude Memory zero-config or with the optional local-first Sakthi Graph for institutional memory that never leaves the user's machine.

Sabha OS is the routing protocol. The Chanakya tradition (Indian strategic thought, the Arthashastra archetype) shapes the voice. Sakthi Graph (forked from MemPalace, MIT) is the optional local-first memory layer pre-shaped for the council. Together they form a stateful AI executive council that compounds decisions over time.

Architecture is local-first by design: the protocol runs as a Claude Code plugin (or as a copy-paste system prompt in Claude.ai, ChatGPT, or any LLM that accepts one); the memory layer runs on the user's machine; only the LLM API call itself crosses the network boundary.

Each role ships as a "deep skill" — not just a voice tweak. Every role loads a REFERENCE knowledge base (multi-framework, with numerical thresholds and citations), heuristics (fast-lookup triage rules), templates (fillable artifacts like runway models and contract redline packages), playbooks (step-by-step procedural workflows), and worked examples (end-to-end scenarios with real numbers). Frameworks come from Kahneman, Christensen, Porter, McKinsey, Skok, Reichheld, AWS Well-Architected, Google SRE, USPTO, GDPR, and the operator-grade canon.

Reproducible LLM-as-judge eval ships in the repo: 48/50 pairwise (96%, Wilson 95% CI [86.5%, 98.9%]) vs no-system-prompt baseline at n=50 with the v3 sub-axis rubric (judge: Claude Opus 4.7, candidate: Claude Sonnet 4.6, 4 question buckets: original-operator, adversarial-reframing, cross-role-edge, underdog). Cross-model judge harness shipped (anthropic/openai/google); cross-family run is the next pending credibility move.

Sister project: Sabha Code — same Chanakya tradition for GitHub Copilot users. First eval 28/30 (93.3%).

## Quickstart

- [No-install path (10 minutes, Claude.ai)](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/docs/QUICKSTART.md): copy-paste the protocol as Custom Instructions; no terminal, no Git, no command-line
- [Claude Code install](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos#install): `claude plugin marketplace add rdmurugan/sabhaos && claude plugin install sabha-os@sabha-marketplace`
- [Optional local memory](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/docs/MEMORY-OPTIONS.md): `uv tool install sakthi-graph && sakthi init --sabha ~/sakthi`

## Core protocol

- [README.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/README.md): full project overview, install, eval results, architecture diagram
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): the protocol itself — classify, memory gate, role voice, mode discipline (ask / engage / deliberate), grounding rules
- [skills/sabha-router/SKILL.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/skills/sabha-router/SKILL.md): the routing engine — forces a role declaration on every reply

## The 9 roles (each a deep skill)

- [CFO](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/tree/main/skills/roles/cfo): budget, revenue, pricing, cash flow, P&L, unit economics, runway, fundraising
- [CMO](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/tree/main/skills/roles/cmo): marketing, brand, positioning, content, SEO, lead gen, PLG, campaigns
- [CIO](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/tree/main/skills/roles/cio): infrastructure, deployment, hosting, security, devops, vendors, cloud
- [CAIO](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/tree/main/skills/roles/caio): AI strategy, LLMs, RAG, embeddings, evals, model selection, AI product
- [CSO](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/tree/main/skills/roles/cso): strategy, competition, partnerships, GTM, growth, market entry, M&A
- [CXO](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/tree/main/skills/roles/cxo): UX, onboarding, retention, NPS, churn, service delivery, support
- [CHRO](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/tree/main/skills/roles/chro): HR, hiring, firing, payroll, labor law, comp, performance, org design
- [CLC](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/tree/main/skills/roles/clc): contracts, IP, privacy, regulatory, employment-legal (NOT legal advice)
- [CEO](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/tree/main/skills/roles/ceo): synthesis when roles disagree; founder-level judgment

## Mode skills (v2.2.0+)

- [skills/modes/deliberate/SKILL.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/skills/modes/deliberate/SKILL.md): multi-role argument protocol — pick 2-3 roles, openings, rebuttals, CEO synthesis, auto-diary; slash command `/deliberate <question>`
- [skills/modes/sakthi-diary/SKILL.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/skills/modes/sakthi-diary/SKILL.md): canonical SABHA_DIARY v1 template (date / agent / mode / entities / question / recommendation / tradeoff / next_move / reversibility / sources / transcript) + backend transport translation table

## Docs

- [docs/QUICKSTART.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/docs/QUICKSTART.md): 10-minute no-installation path for non-developers
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): full system view with Mermaid diagram (graphify → sittham → Sakthi → Sabha), threat model, layer-by-layer
- [docs/ROLES.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/docs/ROLES.md): each role's coverage, voice, what the deep skill ships
- [docs/EVALS.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/docs/EVALS.md): methodology, n=50 results, v3 sub-axis rubric, retired baselines, limitations
- [docs/MEMORY-OPTIONS.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/docs/MEMORY-OPTIONS.md): backend comparison (Claude Memory / Sakthi / mem0 / Letta / Zep / plain folder), SABHA_DIARY v1 transport table
- [docs/PHILOSOPHY.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/docs/PHILOSOPHY.md): the 5 disciplines, why Sabha / Chanakya / Sakthi naming
- [docs/FOR-REGULATED-INDUSTRIES.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/docs/FOR-REGULATED-INDUSTRIES.md): local-first posture, GDPR/HIPAA framing, auditable decision trail
- [docs/CUSTOMIZATION.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/docs/CUSTOMIZATION.md): rename roles, swap memory backends, multiple Sabhas
- [docs/ROADMAP.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md): shipped (v2.2.0), next (v2.3 — per-role eval rubrics, digest skill, data-hooks expansion), Q3 bets with kill criteria

## Presets

- [examples/professional-sakthi.CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/examples/professional-sakthi.CLAUDE.md): default C-suite council
- [examples/personal-sakthi.CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/examples/personal-sakthi.CLAUDE.md): life council (Health · Finance · Family · Career · Time · Self)
- [examples/developer-sakthi.CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/examples/developer-sakthi.CLAUDE.md): code council (Architect · Reviewer · Security · Performance · QA · Mentor)
- [examples/solo-founder.CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/examples/solo-founder.CLAUDE.md): profession-tuned
- [examples/agency.CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/examples/agency.CLAUDE.md): profession-tuned
- [examples/researcher.CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabhaos/blob/main/examples/researcher.CLAUDE.md): profession-tuned

## Sister projects

- [Sabha Code](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sabha-code): same Chanakya tradition for GitHub Copilot users; first eval 28/30 (93.3%)
- [Sakthi Graph](https://github.com/rdmurugan/sakthi-graph): the local-first memory layer (forked from MemPalace, MIT)
